name: us500_m15_opening_range_highatr
hypothesis: On US500 M15, the first 30-minute range after NY cash open (13:30-14:00 UTC) produces a tradable breakout only on days where daily ATR is in the top 40th percentile (high-volatility regime), avoiding chop days that killed generic breakout systems. Breakouts taken only in the direction of the prior-day close vs open bias.

entry_rules.long: close > OR_high + 0.1*ATR(14) AND daily_ATR_percentile >= 60 AND close > EMA200 AND first_breakout_of_day AND time between 14:00-17:00 UTC
entry_rules.short: close < OR_low - 0.1*ATR(14) AND daily_ATR_percentile >= 60 AND close < EMA200 AND first_breakout_of_day AND time between 14:00-17:00 UTC

exit_rules.sl: opposite side of opening range OR 1.0 * OR_width, whichever tighter
exit_rules.tp: 2.0 * OR_width from breakout level, partial 50% at 1.0 * OR_width
